summary: Assistant Dashboard UI redesign testing complete. All major UI components working: Bottom Navigation (4 tabs), Today Focus Strip, Contextual Quick Actions, Call Reminders section, Today Payments section, Desktop Sidebar. Found 1 critical bug: Call Reminder API payload mismatch causing 422 error.

critical.issue: Frontend sends empty body or wrong fields (note_type, note) but backend expects {status: string, notes?: string}. Returns 422 Unprocessable Entity.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing request body - should send {status: 'called'} but sends empty body
Wrong field names - sends {note_type, note} but backend expects {status, notes}

action_items: Fix handleMarkCalled to send {status: 'called'} in request body
Fix handleAddCallNote to send {status: noteType, notes: customNote} instead of {note_type, note}
critical_code_review_comments: Lines 359-361: Field names mismatch - note_type should be status, note should be notes

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all UI components working, 1 API integration bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Assistant Dashboard redesign verified. All UI components render correctly. Bottom navigation works on mobile, sidebar works on desktop. Focus strip shows correct data. Contextual actions show Morning/Afternoon tasks based on time. Call Reminder Mark as Done and Quick Note features have API payload bugs that need fixing.

bottom_navigation_mobile.notes: All 4 tabs clickable and navigate to correct views

today_focus_strip.notes: Mobile shows swipeable cards, Desktop shows horizontal bar with correct counts

contextual_quick_actions.notes: Shows Morning Tasks (6am-12pm) with Call List and Today Schedule buttons

call_reminders_section.notes: UI renders correctly but Mark as Done and Quick Note fail due to API payload mismatch

today_payments_section.notes: Shows Cash/Online/Total breakdown, Record Payment navigates to Payments view, Cash Settlement opens dialog

desktop_sidebar.notes: All sidebar navigation items work, logout button present

mobile_header.notes: Mobile header shows TheraGenie logo and logout button

client_profile_access.notes: Assistant can access client profile page with restricted tabs (Client Details, Calendar, Payments)
